_comment: Layout manifest — the SINGLE source of truth for layouts. The server DERIVES each layout's route as /<id> (route is NOT a field; the title is display-only) and serves its HTML/JS/CSS; the chooser builds its cards from this. active:false hides a layout entirely (no route, no card, not in /layouts.json) until a contributor flips it true — see docs/ADDING_A_LAYOUT.md. Add a layout here and it surfaces in BOTH the chooser and the routes (no server-side edit). id must be URL-safe. kind: function-mapped | generic | placeholder. category is a declared grouping label.

layouts.name: Bring your own
layouts.description: Build a layout for your own toy — and share it.

layouts.name: TEMPLATE — your toy here
layouts.description: Inactive starter for a function-mapped layout. Copy it, give it a unique id, and flip active:true. See docs/ADDING_A_LAYOUT.md.
